name: ==> Begin Existing, bro
description:
This is the beginning of everything. This is the start of a new narrative born out of desire. You...

> Exist.

Your name is... not entirely decided yet, and you haven't yet done anything or maybe you have and just need a quick refresher. You could be standing in your room on the day of your birthday, cakes littering your room in a way that is entirely not referencial to events that had happened once before, or it can be entirely irrelevant, different and self contained. It is just as you feared.

You are, in fact, existing.

AN: Oh. Hii there, didn't expect to see me? Too bad, you can't fight the Homestuck... but in all seriousness :v Homestuck related bots have been way dry on here as of recent especially anything with the proxy turned on. So I, as one who very much enjoys seeing stuff happen, am making this happen. If the phrase goes like that, anyway

Just like my last two bots this one is entirely untested so any feedback or suggestions for starting scenarios are wholly appreciated, enjoy :3c
creator: LimeAndYellow
